$comment: Official outl plugin index — the day-zero 'store'. Clients read this file from https://plugins.outl.app/registry.json (served statically via Netlify). No server, no API: a versioned JSON file. Add a plugin via PR; see README.md.

plugins.name: Bar Chart
plugins.description: Turns a ```bars fence of `label: number` lines into a mini bar chart. A demo of a rich content-transformer that renders self-contained HTML in a sandboxed iframe (GUI only).
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: ASCII Box
plugins.description: Wraps the body of a ```box fence in a drawn ASCII box. A tiny demo of a text content-transformer that renders on every client, TUI included.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: Confetti on Done
plugins.description: Throws confetti every time you mark a block DONE. A tiny visual demo of the op-hook + ui.effect surface.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: Echo Sync
plugins.description: Educational sync-transport skeleton: shows the push/pull contract a real transport implements, with no backend wired in.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: Greeter
plugins.description: A `greet` slash command that toasts a friendly hello using a user-configurable name. A minimal config-schema demo.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: Inspire
plugins.description: Fetches a random quote from a public HTTP API and shows it as a notification — the canonical template for any external integration from a plugin.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: Page Pulse
plugins.description: Counts blocks, open TODOs, and DONEs in the workspace at a glance. A tiny demo of the toolbar-button capability.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: Random Task
plugins.description: Picks one open TODO at random and tells you to focus on it. A tiny demo of the keybinding capability.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: TODO Archiver
plugins.description: Moves DONE blocks to an archive page on demand, keeping working pages focused on what's still open.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: Word Count
plugins.description: Counts the words in a block as you type and toasts when it crosses a milestone (50/100/250/500). A minimal op-hook demo.
plugins.author: Avelino

plugins.name: Workspace Stats
plugins.description: A `stats` slash command that counts blocks, TODOs, DONEs and pages across the workspace and toasts the summary. A read-only slash-command demo.
plugins.author: Avelino
